---
title: "Mosaic Art"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Mosaic Art}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>", eval = FALSE)
```

Mosaics divide an image into regular tiles and summarize each tile color.

```{r}
img <- read_art_image(system.file("extdata", "example.png", package = "ImageArtR"))
square <- image_mosaic_art(img, tile_size = 10, shape = "square")
hex <- image_mosaic_art(img, tile_size = 14, shape = "hexagon", palette_size = 12)
plot(square)
plot(hex)
```
